nasb.text: Then Moses commanded the sons of Israel according to the word of the Lord, saying, “The tribe of the sons of Joseph are right in their statements.

esv.text: And Moses commanded the people of Israel according to the word of the Lord, saying, “The tribe of the people of Joseph is right.

cnv.text: 摩西照著耶和華的話，吩咐以色列說：“約瑟支派的人說得對。

ccb.text: 摩西照耶和华的话吩咐以色列人说：“约瑟支派的人说的对。
